stagePolicy.Collect evidence: 3-5 fresh attempts before any mastery label is trusted.
stagePolicy.Standard SAT: Medium proof in the same subskill without repeated-form misses.
stagePolicy.Trap recognition: Explain the trap before speed work.
stagePolicy.Hard transfer: Fresh hard context, not a cloned template.
stagePolicy.Timed mastery: Accuracy and pace proof in a timed set.
stagePolicy.Maintenance: Fresh review after 14 days without recent misses.
